examples.title: Water Vortex
examples.content: Water spirals down a drain. At distance r=2cm from center, angle θ=90°, height z=5cm. Cylindrical (2, 90°, 5) describes it perfectly.

examples.title: Spinning Top
examples.content: A top spins at radius r=3cm, angle changing with time, height z=8cm. Polar (r,θ) for the spin, plus z for height.

examples.title: Cylinder Geometry
examples.content: A point on a cylinder: distance r=1 from the axis, angle θ=45°, height z=2m. Just cylindrical coordinates (1, 45°, 2).
